title: orchis italica
intro: Orchis italica, also known as the Italian orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Orchis italica include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve kidney function. In herbal preparations, Orchis italica is often used as a powder or tincture, and can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies to enhance their effects.
